raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Senator Cortese intends to introduce legislation that would ban live ammunition from movie sets and theatrical productions in California.",
    "Concern and debate over the safety of prop guns has increased in light of the tragic accidental shooting of cinematographer Halyna Hutchins.",
    "There is an urgent need to address alarming work abuses and safety violations occurring on the set of theatrical productions.",
    "The use of live firearms presents unnecessary high-risk conditions on theatrical sets.",
    "Senator Cortese believes that California should establish new safety standards and best practices for the entertainment industry.",
    "Senator Cortese aims to ensure safe working conditions for workers in the entertainment industry."
  ]
}
```
